mapper.select:
select * from ( select rownum rn, I.* from ( select lot_id as lotId, lot_item as lotItem, lot_vendor as lotVendor, lot_work as lotWork, lot_iqty as lotIqty, lot_fqty as lotFqty, lot_mfd as lotMfd, lot_etw as lotEtw, lot_exp as lotExp, lot_qc as lotQc, lot_status as lotStatus, lot_memo as lotMemo, lot_bwhsec as lotBwhsec, lot_awhsec as lotAwhsec from lot
AND lot_status = #{lotStatus}
AND ( UPPER(lot_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(lot_item) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY lot_id DESC ) I )

SELECT L.LOT_ID AS lotId, L.LOT_ITEM AS lotItem, L.LOT_VENDOR AS lotVendor, L.LOT_WORK AS lotWork, L.LOT_IQTY AS lotIqty, L.LOT_FQTY AS lotFqty, L.LOT_MFD AS lotMfd, L.LOT_ETW AS lotEtw, L.LOT_EXP AS lotExp, L.LOT_QC AS lotQc, L.LOT_STATUS AS lotStatus, L.LOT_MEMO AS lotMemo, L.LOT_BWHSEC AS lotBwhsec, L.LOT_AWHSEC AS lotAwhsec, I.ITEM_TYPE AS itemType FROM LOT L LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON L.LOT_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID WHERE L.LOT_ID = #{lotId}

SELECT USE_ID AS useId, USE_WORK AS useWork, USE_LOT AS useLot, USE_QTY AS useQty, USE_DATE AS useDate, USE_TYPE AS useType, USE_MEMO AS useMemo FROM LOT_USE WHERE USE_LOT = #{lotId} ORDER BY USE_DATE DESC
SELECT IO_ID AS ioId, IO_TYPE AS ioType, IO_REASON AS ioReason, IO_LOT AS ioLot, IO_QTY AS ioQty, IO_DATE AS ioDate, IO_MSG AS ioMsg FROM IO WHERE IO_LOT = #{lotId} ORDER BY IO_DATE DESC
